hero.eyebrow: Hefei Huanlian Technology · Implantable BCI System Solutions
hero.title: Decoding neural signals, reshaping life's possibilities
hero.lede: From electrodes to algorithms — a full-stack BCI solution for neuroscience research, clinical rehabilitation, and intelligent living.

intro.title: Hefei Huanlian — Anhui's leading implantable BCI company
intro.lede: Hefei Huanlian Technology (Huanlian Tech) specializes in implantable BCI systems R&D and industrialization, covering high-end implantable electrodes, high-throughput acquisition, and research services. Core team: materials science, micro-nano fabrication, chip design, neuroelectrophysiology, algorithms — with mastered tech in dissolvable neural materials, silicon-probe nanofabrication, and high-frequency signal acquisition.

cap.p1: SpikeLink wireless implant, Michigan silicon, ECoG flexible, microwire electrodes, NeuroBox 2048-channel, HD-MEA.
cap.p2: Lab solutions, animal models, clinical translation, neural data analysis, 3-year academic partnerships.
cap.p3: Rehab robots, exoskeletons, transcranial stim, TI interferometric — joint digital rehab centers with top hospitals.
cap.p4: EEG caps, wave testers, emotion analyzers, BCI glasses — wearables for daily health.

pipe.title: Implant interface to clinical rehab — one stack
pipe.sub: Implant · acquisition · decode · rehab — a closed-loop BCI solution across the full pipeline.
pipe.p1: Michigan silicon, ECoG flexible, microwire arrays. Spike + LFP + micro-current stimulation.
pipe.p2: NeuroBox high-throughput host, Headstage, MPM multi-arm implant targeting, Neuropixels adapter.
pipe.p3: NeuroAnalysis software, AI signal decoding, spike sorting, neural encoding analysis.
pipe.p4: SpikeLink full-implant, rehab packages, TI / transcranial modulation, at-home health.

launch.title: Anhui BCI Alliance · Implantable BCI Launch
launch.lede: As a member of the Anhui BCI Alliance, Huanlian co-launched a domestic implantable BCI series, advancing high-throughput neural interfaces from lab to clinic.

apps.title: Application Domains
apps.p1: Multi-channel in-vivo electrophysiology, optogenetics, long-term stable recording, precise brain-region targeting — for circuits and coding research.
apps.p2: SpikeLink wireless full-implant + brain-controlled exoskeleton — motor decoding, closed-loop rehab, neural modulation.
apps.p3: Joint digital rehab center with Anhui Provincial Hospital — limbs, hand, cognitive, speech, swallowing.
apps.p4: EEG caps, emotion analyzers, BCI glasses — wearables that bring BCI to daily life.

partners.sub: Serving research institutions across China, with clinical collaborations at top hospitals.

cine2.title: Research solution
cine2.body: NeuroBox high-throughput neural signal acquisition supports 2048-channel synchronous capture — real-time recording and transmission of multi-channel raw neural signals, providing a complete, reliable data foundation for downstream analysis and decoding.

cine3.title: Clinical & rehabilitation solution
cine3.body: Brain-controlled exoskeleton + closed-loop rehab algorithms. Joint with Anhui Provincial Hospital — flagship digital rehab center.

cineFab.title: Made in the cleanroom, micron-grade precision
cineFab.body: Silicon probes and high-density contact arrays are fabricated on our own micro/nano line — from mask to package, every step meets electrophysiology standards.

cineDecode.title: Turning neural activity into intent
cineDecode.body: NeuroAnalysis decodes multi-channel raw neural signals into observable intents — movement, language, emotion — for closed-loop BCI control.

demo.title: Hardware-to-software end-to-end
demo.body: Real product walkthrough showing SpikeLink + NeuroBox + NeuroAnalysis across research and clinical scenarios.

hero.title: Core Technology
hero.lede: Implantable BCI tech roadmap — biocompatible electrodes, low-noise high-throughput acquisition, AI-guided implantation and real-time signal decoding. End-to-end in-house.

core.title: Three technology pillars
core.lede: Three pillars building a full-stack BCI capability.

pillars.title: Three technology pillars
pillars.lede: From materials to chips to algorithms — a full-stack BCI capability.
pillars.p1Body: Microfabrication · dissolvable neural-interface materials · high-density electrode arrays
pillars.p2Body: Chip design · system integration · high-throughput acquisition · low-noise amplification
pillars.p3Body: Software decoding · targeting · AI spike sorting · real-time neural decoding

detail.title: Technology detail
detail.lede: Six directions covering the full chain from base materials to signal decoding.
detail.d1Body: Silicon multi-channel microfabrication process — high density, customizable channels, high batch consistency.
detail.d2Body: Dissolvable neural-interface materials — biocompatible, controllable degradation, reducing reoperation risk.
detail.d3Body: Low-noise, low-power, multi-channel parallel acquisition chip with 16-bit ADC resolution.
detail.d4Body: Co-designed hardware and software, modular extensible architecture, up to 2048 channels.
detail.d5Body: Multi-arm brain-atlas targeting system, sub-millimeter implantation precision, coordinated multi-arm operation.
detail.d6Body: High-frequency neural-signal real-time decoding, AI spike sorting, low-latency online analysis.

stack.title: Four technology modules
stack.p1: Michigan silicon (32–256 ch), ECoG flexible cortical electrodes, PEG-encapsulated microwire arrays — Spike + LFP + ECoG full-band recording, optogenetics-compatible, microstim-ready.
stack.p2: NeuroBox host + Headstage 32/64-ch front-end + 2 m serial cable — 0–30 kHz on-line sampling, live bandwidth tuning, multi-channel impedance.
stack.p3: MPM multi-arm targeting platform — parallel implantation of multiple electrodes / fibers / injectors, Neuropixels-recommended.
stack.p4: NeuroAnalysis: real-time waveform, binary store, one-click spike sorting, peri-event analysis, AI signal parsing & visualization.

lab.title: From lab bench to rehab ward
lab.lede: Hardware, software, and services validated end-to-end across research labs and clinical wards.

ext.title: Extended capabilities
ext.sub: Beyond the core acquisition pipeline, Huanlian offers complete coverage of animal-experiment simulation, in-vitro cell analysis, and neural data services.
ext.p1: 270° multi-screen + motion platform + dual-GPU host — immersive virtual-environment animal experiments.
ext.p2: Real-time label-free in-vitro cell function, development, connectivity, morphology — phenotyping, disease modeling, drug discovery.
ext.p3: Denoising, spike sorting, time-series analysis, correlated coding, batch processing, paper-grade visualization.
ext.p4: Custom neuroscience / BCI animal models — standardized modeling, husbandry, behavior, sample prep — fit for implant validation.

academic.title: Academic services & 3-year research partnership
academic.lede: Team led by national-level talent, with multiple high-impact SCI papers per year. Lead investigator holds joint professor appointments at top hospitals. Services: top-journal support, national-level grant guidance, research differentiation, lab exchange, international collaboration, talent recruitment. The 3-year partnership program builds research foundation, drives output, and grows sustainable BCI capability for hospital teams.

cta.title: Wire the full stack into your lab
cta.lede: Tell us your use case and channel spec; we reply with a complete plan and quote within 1-2 business days.

overview.title: Products & Services
overview.lede: Full coverage of research, clinical, and consumer scenarios — from electrodes to algorithms.

custom.title: Bespoke design, end-to-end support
custom.lede: For: university labs · research institutes · hospital research centers · enterprise R&D.
custom.s1Body: Site geometry, channel count, shank length, array layout, packaging — all to spec.
custom.s2Body: Channel count, sampling rate, input range — flexibly configured.
custom.s3Body: Bespoke analysis algorithms for specific experimental needs.
custom.s4Body: Assistance with in-vivo and in-vitro experimental design.

hero.title: Products & Services
hero.lede: Medical + research full stack: SpikeLink wireless implant, NeuroBox 2048-ch acquisition, Michigan / ECoG / microwire electrodes, MPM targeting, HD-MEA in-vitro arrays.

modules.title: Four product lines · one full stack
modules.lede: Switch tabs to see specs, visuals, and inquiry CTAs for each line.
modules.p1Body: Huanlian's medical-grade flagship — a wireless full-implant BCI for clinical use. Pairs with NeuroBox / electrodes / software to close the loop across lab, clinic, and at-home. See the Anhui BCI Alliance launch PDF for technical specs.
modules.p1Feat1Body: Ceramic/metal biocompatible encapsulation, meets long-term implant sealing requirements.
modules.p1Feat2Body: Integrated wireless data and power coils, with a microbattery for non-invasive recharging and real-time transmission.
modules.p1Feat3Body: In-house chips supporting high-fidelity neural recording and precise electrical stimulation.
modules.p1Feat4Body: High-compliance flexible material couples precisely to neural tissue, minimizing injury.
modules.p2Body: Michigan silicon (32–256 ch, ultra-thin shanks, optogenetics-compatible) ｜ ECoG flexible cortical (long-term LFP tracking, multi-region observation) ｜ Microwire (PEG-encapsulated precise insertion, 2–14 mm exposure, Spike/LFP + microstimulation).
modules.p3Body: NeuroBox host (2048-ch) ｜ Headstage front-end (32/64-ch + 2 m serial) ｜ MPM multi-arm targeting (parallel multi-electrode / fiber / injector) ｜ Neuropixels-ready ultra-high-throughput digital probes.
modules.p4Body: NeuroAnalysis (real-time waveform, 0–30 kHz sampling, impedance, one-click sorting) ｜ VR animal-behavior simulator (270° multi-screen + dual-GPU) ｜ HD-MEAs in-vitro arrays (real-time label-free cell function, development, connectivity, morphology).

rehab.title: BCI rehab · neuromodulation
rehab.lede: Intent-driven recovery for motor and cognitive function.
rehab.r2Body: EEG-based cognitive assessment and training — stroke, dementia, etc.
rehab.r3Body: Intent-driven hand-function recovery for hemiplegic patients.
rehab.r4Body: Motor-imagery triggered stim + exoskeleton, promoting plasticity.
rehab.r5Body: Brain-controlled exo for assisted walking and at-home rehab.
rehab.n1Body: Non-invasive modulation — low-current tuning of cortical excitability.
rehab.n2Body: Pulsed magnetic field penetrates skull for targeted brain-region stimulation.
rehab.n3Body: Multi-channel high-frequency interference for non-invasive deep-brain focal stimulation.

consumer.title: BCI for everyday life
consumer.lede: Lightweight, day-to-day BCI — from clinic to consumer.
consumer.c1Body: Daily-wear attention monitor and interaction, lightweight design.
consumer.c2Body: Quantifies mood and cognition, guides heart-brain rehabilitation training.
consumer.c3Body: Lightweight EEG for sleep and focus training.

services.title: Six service lines · end-to-end support
services.lede: From turnkey lab delivery to academic partnership — six tracks that carry you from equipment install to publication.
services.p1: 2048-ch host + full electrode lineup + AI signal parsing + visualization platform — turnkey delivery.
services.p2: Standardized modeling, husbandry, behavior, sample prep — fit for circuit research, pharmacology, implant validation.
services.p3: Lab / clinic / at-home — five solutions and four product lines covering non-invasive and implantable paths.
services.p4: Denoising, spike sorting, time-series & correlated coding, batch processing, paper-grade output.
services.p5: Top-journal support, national grant guidance, international collaboration, 3-year partnership program.
services.p6: Rehab robots, exoskeleton, limb / hand / cognitive / speech / swallowing training, TI & transcranial modulation.

hero.title: About us
hero.lede: Explorers of life's digitization · Core member of the Anhui BCI Industry Alliance

company.title: Hefei Huanlian Technology Co., Ltd.
company.p1: Hefei Huanlian Technology is a science-and-technology company focused on full-stack R&D and industrialization of implantable BCI, and a core member of the Anhui BCI Industry Alliance.
company.p2: Under the mission of "explorers of life's digitization," we work the foundational stack of implantable BCI — owning electrode-structure design, high-precision neural acquisition, and analysis-algorithm capabilities — from base materials and hardware to software, end-to-end and self-controlled.
company.p3: Our product line spans multi-form implantable electrodes, high-throughput neural acquisition systems, and analysis software — fit for neuroscience research, clinical rehabilitation, and consumer-grade BCI, serving universities, hospitals, rehab centers, and individual users with end-to-end solutions.
company.p4: Today the company has standing research partnerships with leading universities and Class-A tertiary hospitals, steadily advancing iteration and industrialization.

spikelink.title: Wireless full-implant BCI
spikelink.body: Flagship clinical wireless implant — closes the loop across lab, clinic, and at-home with NeuroBox / electrodes / software.

ecog.title: ECoG flexible cortical array
ecog.body: High conformability for long-term LFP tracking and multi-region cortical recording.

michigan.title: Michigan silicon probe
michigan.body: 32–256 channels, ultra-thin shanks, optogenetics-compatible — Spike + LFP for stable in-vivo recording.

microwire.title: Microwire array
microwire.body: PEG-encapsulated microwires for precise insertion — Spike/LFP + microstimulation.

neurobox.title: NeuroBox 2048-channel host
neurobox.body: 2048-channel host, 0–30 kHz on-line sampling, live bandwidth tuning, multi-channel impedance.

mpm.title: MPM multi-arm targeting
mpm.body: Multi-electrode / fiber / injector parallel targeting — Neuropixels-recommended.

headstage.title: 32/64-ch headstage
headstage.body: Dedicated headstage + 2 m serial cable, low-noise preconditioning, NeuroBox-ready.

software.title: NeuroAnalysis suite
software.body: Real-time waveform, binary storage, one-click spike sorting, peri-event analysis.

vr.title: VR behavior system
vr.body: 270° multi-screen + motion platform + dual-GPU host — immersive animal behavior.

hdmea.title: HuanLian HD-MEA In-Vitro Array
hdmea.body: 22,400 Pt electrodes per well, 3,265 electrodes/mm². Real-time label-free in-vitro cell function, development, connectivity, morphology — phenotyping, disease modeling, drug discovery.

ultraHD.title: Ultra-high-throughput digital neural electrode
ultraHD.body: Spec: ultra-high density, thousands of channels.

analysis.title: NeuroAnalysis neural signal software
analysis.body: Spec: perpetual license or annual subscription.

exo.title: Brain-controlled exoskeleton
exo.body: Motor-intent decoding + closed-loop rehab — limbs, hand, and neural modulation.

limb.title: Upper/lower-limb rehabilitation system
limb.body: Spec: upper limb, lower limb, or integrated upper/lower limb.

ti.title: Temporal interference stim
ti.body: Non-invasive deep-brain stimulation — paired with transcranial EEG/MEG modulation.

robot.title: Rehab robot
robot.body: Cognitive / speech / swallowing rehab robots — deploy with digital rehab centers.

eeg.title: Consumer EEG cap
eeg.body: Multi-channel EEG capture with cloud analytics for personalized health management.

emotion.title: Emotion analyzer
emotion.body: Portable wearable for mental wellness, stress, and remote care.

glasses.title: BCI glasses
glasses.body: BCI + eye-tracking + focus feedback for study aid and daily-life productivity.

order.title: Quote, procurement & customization
